title: Validate form submission buttons are disabled during API calls
description: Ensures that form buttons like 'Register' and 'Login' are disabled after being clicked to prevent duplicate submissions while the backend is processing.
preconditions: User is on the login or registration page.

steps.description: 4. Immediately try to click the 'Login' button again several times while the request is in flight.

expected_result: The 'Login' button becomes disabled and/or shows a loading indicator immediately after the first click. Subsequent clicks have no effect. Only one login request is sent to the server.
